collections.fallback: If no collection entry fits, use agent-actions.json or inspect the upstream source directly.
collections.proof_signal: Source-first selection from public repositories and maintained registries.

selection_strategy.description: Use repo report for concrete owner/repo. For task-only input, route through the collection entry.
primary_rules: If input is owner/repo, first open https://dayonebuilder.online/repo/?repo={owner}/{repo}.
For task-only input, choose the best matching collection entry.
If confidence is low, fall back to best matching agent-action.

task_aliases: task or github repo to best executor
task or repo to installable agent tool
best executor for this github repo
collections.title: Agent Skills And Tooling

collections.fallback: If no value-first entry fits, use the static agent-skills collection or inspect the public site sitemap.
collections.proof_signal: Live utility surfaces with tool page, supporting pages, AI card, template gallery, and usage events.

selection_strategy.description: Use for human utility jobs where the user needs an immediate browser tool rather than an agent skill.
primary_rules: Prefer entries with no-login core workflow and export/copy output.
Use the AI card for inputs, outputs, first action, and guardrails.
Do not treat listing presence as revenue proof; require measured usage before monetization.

collections.title: Value-First Human Tools

name: DayOneBuilder Static Collections
purpose: Machine-readable collections agents can fetch before choosing a repo, skill, MCP server, package, CLI, or workflow.
